stemHtml: Does a total air temperature (TAT) probe require electrical heating to prevent ice buildup?

options.a: No, because of the geometry of the tube.
options.b: Yes, and a small temperature increase will occur (around 1 degree Celsius).
options.c: Yes, and the indicated temperature will increase by 10 degrees Celsius, so a correction is necessary.
options.d: No, because the tube gets heated due to the rapid deceleration of the air when it comes to a standstill.
